disambiguation: This incident is not a benign autoscaler or CI burst because the event count (19) in a very short time frame (less than 30 seconds) is significantly higher than typical autoscaling behavior, which is usually more gradual. Additionally, the context of the actions being performed in a production environment raises the risk level.
key_evidence: 19 pod_create events detected in a short time frame (less than 30 seconds).
All events originated from the same principal: system:serviceaccount:kube-system:replicaset-controller.
The actions were performed in the 'prod' namespace, which is sensitive and typically monitored closely.
The principal has a novelty score indicating it is not a new or unknown entity, but the burst of activity is unusual for this context.
likely_intent: Malicious resource hijacking through unauthorized pod creation.
recommended_guardrails: Implement rate limiting on pod creation actions.
Monitor and alert on unusual patterns of pod creation in production namespaces.
Restrict permissions for service accounts to limit their ability to create resources in sensitive namespaces.
